description: Provides an interface for tools to interact with Bun's development server.

types.description: Unique identifier for a connected HMR WebSocket client.
Identifier for a specific route bundle within DevServer.
A base64 encoded string representing a binary payload originally defined by DevServer's WebSocket protocol (MessageId enum in DevServer.zig).

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Enables the BunFrontendDevServer domain, sending events as they occur.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Disables the BunFrontendDevServer domain, stopping further events from being sent.

events.name: clientConnected
events.description: Fired when a new HMR WebSocket client connects.

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Identifier for the newly connected client.

events.name: clientDisconnected
events.description: Fired when an HMR WebSocket client disconnects.

events.name: bundleStart
events.description: Fired when the DevServer starts processing a new bundle.

parameters.name: triggerFiles
parameters.description: List of file paths that triggered this bundle.

events.name: bundleComplete
events.description: Fired when the DevServer successfully completes a bundle without build errors.

parameters.name: durationMs
parameters.description: Time taken for the bundle in milliseconds.

events.name: bundleFailed
events.description: Fired when the DevServer completes a bundle with build errors. The payload is the base64 encoded binary data corresponding to the 'errors' MessageId.

parameters.name: buildErrorsPayloadBase64
parameters.description: Base64 encoded binary payload containing serialized build errors (MessageId.errors format).

events.name: clientNavigated
events.description: Fired when a connected client navigates to a new URL (via history API or initial load).

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: Identifier for the client that navigated.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The new URL the client navigated to.

parameters.name: routeBundleId
parameters.description: The DevServer route bundle ID associated with this URL, if matched.

events.name: clientErrorReported
events.description: Fired when an error reported by a client (via the /_bun/report_error endpoint) has been processed and potentially remapped by the server. The payload is the base64 encoded binary data corresponding to the remapped error format (similar to MessageId.errors but potentially containing only one error).

parameters.name: clientErrorPayloadBase64
parameters.description: Base64 encoded binary payload containing the processed/remapped client error.
